title: Alistair Cockburn
body: Alistair Cockburn ( AL-ist-ər KOH-bərn) is an American computer scientist, known as one of the initiators of the agile movement in software development. He cosigned (with 16 others) the Manifesto for Agile Software Development.
categories: BLP articles lacking sources from August 2015
